finalSummary:
## Prioritized Improvement Backlog

### P1 — Reliability / breakage prevention (do first)

1) **Fix route-level dynamic import path bugs (runtime failures)**
- **Files:**  
  - `src/gateway/routes/goals.router.ts` (e.g., `require('./goal-decomposer')` at line ~79, `require('./prompt-mutation')` at ~168)  
  - `src/gateway/routes/connections.router.ts` (e.g., `require('./browser-tools.js')` at ~139/~153, `require('../integrations/connector-registry.js')` at ~93/~117)
- **Change summary:** Replace
